description: Curated knowledge graph of ML systems topics for Staff-level technical interview preparation. 77 topics across 13 competency areas with prerequisite, hierarchical, and lateral relationships.

topics.name: Roofline Analysis
topics.description: Using the roofline model to diagnose compute-bound vs memory-bound workloads and predict accelerator utilization.

topics.name: GPU Compute Architecture
topics.description: GPU execution model: warps, thread blocks, occupancy, Tensor Cores, and memory coalescing.

topics.name: Accelerator Comparison
topics.description: Comparing CPUs, GPUs, TPUs, NPUs, and custom ASICs across the programmability-efficiency spectrum.

topics.name: MCU Compute Constraints
topics.description: Compute limits on microcontrollers: no FPU, SIMD utilization (CMSIS-NN), MHz-level clock speeds, integer-only arithmetic.

topics.name: Systolic Arrays & Dataflow
topics.description: Systolic array architectures, weight-stationary vs output-stationary dataflows, and tiling strategies.

topics.name: Compute Cost Estimation
topics.description: Estimating FLOPs, GPU-hours, and dollar cost for training and inference workloads.

topics.name: VRAM Budgeting
topics.description: Accounting for weights, optimizer state, activations, and KV-cache in GPU memory.

topics.name: KV-Cache Management
topics.description: KV-cache sizing, paged attention, cache eviction policies, and memory pressure from long contexts.

topics.name: Memory Hierarchy Design
topics.description: Registers, SRAM, HBM, DRAM, and storage tiers: capacity-bandwidth-latency tradeoffs.

topics.name: Activation Memory & Checkpointing
topics.description: Forward-pass activation storage, gradient checkpointing, and the compute-memory tradeoff.

topics.name: Memory-Mapped Inference
topics.description: Memory-mapped weight loading, mmap strategies, cold start avoidance, and shared memory across processes.

topics.name: Tensor Arena Planning
topics.description: Static memory planning for MCUs: flat tensor arenas, operator scheduling for peak SRAM, flash vs SRAM placement.

topics.name: DMA & Data Movement
topics.description: DMA transfers, zero-copy techniques, pinned memory, and host-device data movement overhead.

topics.name: Memory Pressure Management
topics.description: OOM handling, memory fragmentation, gradient accumulation to reduce batch memory, and OS-level eviction.

topics.name: Latency Decomposition
topics.description: Breaking end-to-end latency into components: TTFT, TPOT, network, preprocessing, and postprocessing.

topics.name: Batching Strategies
topics.description: Static, dynamic, and continuous batching: throughput-latency tradeoffs and scheduling policies.

topics.name: Tail Latency & SLAs
topics.description: P99/P999 latency, straggler mitigation, hedged requests, and SLA-driven system design.

topics.name: Real-Time Deadlines
topics.description: Frame budgets (16ms/33ms), WCET analysis, jank prevention, ANR timeouts, and interrupt-driven pipelines.

topics.name: Profiling & Bottleneck Analysis
topics.description: Using profilers, flame graphs, and trace tools to identify compute, memory, and I/O bottlenecks.

topics.name: Queueing Theory
topics.description: Little's Law, arrival rate vs service rate, queue depth sizing, and capacity planning.

topics.name: Quantization Fundamentals
topics.description: INT8/INT4 quantization, zero-point arithmetic, calibration strategies, PTQ vs QAT, per-tensor vs per-channel.

topics.name: Mixed-Precision Training & Inference
topics.description: FP16/BF16/FP8 formats, loss scaling, mixed-precision recipes, and precision-accuracy tradeoffs.

topics.name: Extreme Quantization
topics.description: Sub-4-bit quantization, binary/ternary networks, GPTQ, AWQ, and accuracy recovery techniques.

topics.name: Power Budgeting
topics.description: TDP, power caps, DVFS P-states, the CMOS power equation, and energy-per-inference calculations.

topics.name: Thermal Management
topics.description: Thermal throttling, sustained vs burst performance, cooling strategies, and ambient temperature effects.

topics.name: Energy Per Operation
topics.description: Horowitz energy table, energy cost of memory access vs compute, and energy-aware operator selection.

topics.name: Duty Cycling & Energy Harvesting
topics.description: Sleep/wake scheduling, coin cell budgets, solar harvesting, and always-on vs triggered inference.

topics.name: Datacenter Efficiency
topics.description: PUE, rack power budgets, liquid cooling, carbon-aware scheduling, and embodied vs operational carbon.

topics.name: Transformer Systems Cost
topics.description: Scaling laws, parameter-FLOP relationships, attention complexity (O(n²) vs linear), and KV-cache growth.

topics.name: CNN Efficient Design
topics.description: Depthwise separable convolutions, MobileNet/EfficientNet design, inverted residuals, and FLOP-accuracy tradeoffs.

topics.name: Attention Scaling & Variants
topics.description: Multi-head, grouped-query, and multi-query attention; context length scaling; sliding window attention.

topics.name: Mixture of Experts
topics.description: MoE routing, expert parallelism, capacity factors, load balancing, and the memory-FLOPs decoupling.

topics.name: Model Size Estimation
topics.description: Parameter counting, memory footprint estimation, and feasibility checks for target hardware.

topics.name: Neural Architecture Search
topics.description: Hardware-aware NAS, search spaces constrained by SRAM/FLOPs/latency, and MCUNet-style approaches.

topics.name: Encoder-Decoder Tradeoffs
topics.description: Choosing architectures for deployment constraints: encoder-only vs decoder-only vs encoder-decoder system costs.

topics.name: Pruning & Sparsity
topics.description: Structured vs unstructured pruning, sparsity patterns for accelerator alignment, and accuracy-speedup tradeoffs.

topics.name: Knowledge Distillation
topics.description: Teacher-student training, logit matching, feature distillation, and when distillation beats pruning.

topics.name: Kernel & Operator Fusion
topics.description: Fusing memory-bound operators, reducing kernel launch overhead, and custom CUDA kernel design.

topics.name: Graph Compilation & Optimization
topics.description: Ahead-of-time compilation, operator lowering, constant folding, and framework compilers.

topics.name: Operator Scheduling
topics.description: Execution order optimization for memory reuse, parallel operator execution, and layer fusion scheduling.

topics.name: IO-Aware Attention
topics.description: FlashAttention-style tiling, IO-aware algorithm design, and online softmax for memory-efficient attention.

topics.name: Speculative Decoding
topics.description: Draft-verify decoding, acceptance rates, draft model selection, and latency reduction for autoregressive generation.

topics.name: Data Parallelism
topics.description: Replicated model training across devices, gradient averaging, FSDP/ZeRO memory sharding.

topics.name: Model & Tensor Parallelism
topics.description: Splitting model layers across devices, column/row partitioning, and communication-computation overlap.

topics.name: Pipeline Parallelism
topics.description: Splitting model stages across devices, micro-batching, bubble overhead, and interleaved schedules.

topics.name: 3D Parallelism
topics.description: Combining data, tensor, and pipeline parallelism for frontier model training.

topics.name: Gradient Synchronization
topics.description: AllReduce algorithms, gradient compression, asynchronous SGD, and stale gradient handling.

topics.name: Scheduling & Resource Management
topics.description: GPU scheduling, MIG/MPS partitioning, gang scheduling, preemption, and multi-tenant resource sharing.

topics.name: Collective Communication
topics.description: AllReduce, AllGather, ReduceScatter: algorithms, bandwidth-optimal implementations, and ring vs tree topologies.

topics.name: Interconnect Topology
topics.description: Fat-tree, torus, dragonfly topologies; NVLink, NVSwitch, PCIe, and InfiniBand interconnects.

topics.name: Network Bandwidth Bottlenecks
topics.description: Bisection bandwidth, communication-computation ratio, network-bound training, and bandwidth cost modeling.

topics.name: RDMA & High-Performance Transport
topics.description: RDMA, RoCE, InfiniBand verbs, zero-copy networking, and kernel bypass for distributed training.

topics.name: Load Balancing & Routing
topics.description: Request routing, consistent hashing, weighted round-robin, and inference traffic management.

topics.name: Congestion & Flow Control
topics.description: ECN, PFC, DCQCN, incast congestion, and flow scheduling in GPU cluster networks.

topics.name: Model Serving Infrastructure
topics.description: Inference servers, model loading, request handling, autoscaling, and cold start optimization.

topics.name: MLOps Lifecycle
topics.description: Model registries, CI/CD for ML, experiment tracking, reproducibility, and training-serving consistency.

topics.name: OTA & Firmware Updates
topics.description: A/B partition schemes, firmware-over-the-air, rollback mechanisms, and flash programming constraints.

topics.name: Container & Cluster Orchestration
topics.description: Kubernetes for ML, GPU device plugins, node affinity, and job scheduling for training clusters.

topics.name: Model Format & Runtime Conversion
topics.description: ONNX, TFLite, CoreML, TensorRT conversion; operator coverage gaps; and delegation strategies.

topics.name: A/B & Rollout Strategies
topics.description: Blue-green, canary, shadow deployments; traffic splitting; and progressive rollout with rollback.

topics.name: Compound AI Systems
topics.description: Multi-model pipelines, RAG architectures, agent orchestration, routing between models, and end-to-end latency management across chained inference calls.

topics.name: Fault Tolerance & Checkpointing
topics.description: Checkpoint strategies, Young-Daly formula, preemption recovery, and failure modes at scale.

topics.name: Distribution & Drift Detection
topics.description: Data drift, concept drift, training-serving skew, and statistical detection methods (KL divergence, PSI).

topics.name: Graceful Degradation
topics.description: Degradation ladders, model fallbacks, fail-safe vs fail-operational, and quality-of-service shedding.

topics.name: Safety & Certification
topics.description: ISO 26262, functional safety levels, watchdog timers, self-test routines, and deterministic execution.

topics.name: Adversarial Robustness & Security
topics.description: Adversarial attacks, prompt injection, model extraction, side-channel attacks, and defense strategies.

topics.name: Monitoring & Observability
topics.description: Telemetry, alerting, MTBF/MTTR, straggler detection, and production health dashboards.

topics.name: Data Pipeline Engineering
topics.description: ETL/ELT pipelines, throughput bottlenecks, data loading optimization, and the data pipeline equation.

topics.name: Feature Store & Feature Engineering
topics.description: Online/offline feature stores, feature freshness, point-in-time correctness, and feature pipelines.

topics.name: Data Quality & Validation
topics.description: Schema validation, data contracts, quality gates, lineage tracking, and anomaly detection in data.

topics.name: Dataset Curation & Labeling
topics.description: Data selection, annotation workflows, inter-annotator agreement, active learning, and dataset bias.

topics.name: Streaming & Real-Time Ingestion
topics.description: Stream processing, event-driven pipelines, sensor data ingestion, and real-time feature computation.

topics.name: Storage Format & Selection
topics.description: Parquet, TFRecord, columnar vs row formats, compression tradeoffs, and storage tier selection.

topics.name: Data Efficiency & Selection
topics.description: Coreset selection, curriculum learning, data pruning, the data wall problem, synthetic data generation, model collapse risks, and the Information-Compute Ratio (ICR) framework.

topics.name: Federated Learning
topics.description: Federated averaging, communication efficiency, non-IID data challenges, and cross-device vs cross-silo.

topics.name: Differential Privacy
topics.description: DP-SGD, privacy budgets (epsilon), noise calibration, and the privacy-utility tradeoff.

topics.name: Fairness & Bias Evaluation
topics.description: Demographic parity, equalized odds, intersectional fairness, and subgroup evaluation methodology.

topics.name: Responsible AI & Governance
topics.description: Model cards, impact assessments, red-teaming, guardrails, and organizational accountability frameworks.

topics.name: TCO & Cost Modeling
topics.description: Total cost of ownership, buy vs rent, spot vs reserved instances, and cost-performance Pareto analysis.
